    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstUse!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).parent = (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).firstOp = (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).lastOp = (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).prev = (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).next = (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).parent = (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOpType!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getOpType! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getOpType! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.attrs!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds)).attrs = (operation.get! ctx).attrs
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getProperties!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {propT : OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getProperties! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) propT = operation.getProperties! ctx propT
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumResults! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getNumResults! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {opResult : OpResultPtr} :
    opResult.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = if (opOperand'.get! ctx).back = OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.opResult opResult) then have __src := opResult.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := (opOperand'.get! ctx).nextUse, index := __src.index, owner := __src.owner } else opResult.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumOperands! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getNumOperands! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtr.get!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {opOperand : OpOperandPtr} :
    opOperand.get! (removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = have __src := opOperand.get! ctx; { nextUse := if (opOperand'.get! ctx).back = OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse opOperand then (opOperand'.get! ctx).nextUse else (opOperand.get! ctx).nextUse, back := if (opOperand'.get! ctx).nextUse = some opOperand then (opOperand'.get! ctx).back else (opOperand.get! ctx).back, owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value }
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getOperands! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getOperands! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumSuccessors!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumSuccessors! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtr.get!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {blockOperand : BlockOperandPtr} :
    blockOperand.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = blockOperand.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_OpOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumRegions! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source
    @[simp]

    blockArg.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = if (opOperand'.get! ctx).back = OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.blockArgument blockArg) then have __src := blockArg.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := (opOperand'.get! ctx).nextUse, index := __src.index, loc := __src.loc, owner := __src.owner } else blockArg.get! ctx

    opOperandPtr.get! (OpOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = if opOperandPtr = (opOperand'.get! ctx).back then (opOperand'.get! ctx).nextUse else opOperandPtr.get! ctx

    opResult.get! (OpOperandPtr.insertIntoCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = if (opOperand'.get! ctx).value = ValuePtr.opResult opResult then have __src := opResult.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := some opOperand', index := __src.index, owner := __src.owner } else opResult.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_OpOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    opOperand.get! (insertIntoCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = have __src := opOperand.get! ctx; { nextUse := if opOperand' = opOperand then (opOperand'.get! ctx).value.getFirstUse! ctx else (opOperand.get! ctx).nextUse, back := if (opOperand'.get! ctx).value.getFirstUse! ctx = some opOperand then OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse opOperand' else if opOperand' = opOperand then OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse (opOperand'.get! ctx).value else (opOperand.get! ctx).back, owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value }
    source

    value.getFirstUse! (OpOperandPtr.insertIntoCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = if (opOperand'.get! ctx).value = value then some opOperand' else value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source

    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_OpOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {opOperand' : OpOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hopOperand' : opOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {value : ValuePtr} :

    opOperandPtr.get! (OpOperandPtr.insertIntoCurrent ctx opOperand' hopOperand' ctxInBounds) = if opOperandPtr = operandNextUse opOperand' then (opOperand'.get! ctx).value.getFirstUse! ctx else if opOperandPtr = valueFirstUse (opOperand'.get! ctx).value then some opOperand' else opOperandPtr.get! ctx

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_BlockOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumRegions! (BlockOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx blockOperand' hOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getRegion!_BlockOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {i : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getRegion! (BlockOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx blockOperand' hOperand' ctxInBounds) i = operation.getRegion! ctx i

    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.get!_BlockOperandPtr_removeFromCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {blockOperandPtr : BlockOperandPtrPtr} :
    blockOperandPtr.get! (BlockOperandPtr.removeFromCurrent ctx blockOperand' hOperand' ctxInBounds) = if blockOperandPtr = (blockOperand'.get! ctx).back then (blockOperand'.get! ctx).nextUse else blockOperandPtr.get! ctx

    (block.get! (BlockOperandPtr.insertIntoCurrent ctx blockOperand' hblockOperand' ctxInBounds)).firstUse = if (blockOperand'.get! ctx).value = block then some blockOperand' else (block.get! ctx).firstUse

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumSuccessors!_BlockOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hblockOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtr.get!_BlockOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hblockOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {blockOperand : BlockOperandPtr} :
    blockOperand.get! (insertIntoCurrent ctx blockOperand' hblockOperand' ctxInBounds) = have __src := blockOperand.get! ctx; { nextUse := if blockOperand' = blockOperand then ((blockOperand'.get! ctx).value.get! ctx).firstUse else (blockOperand.get! ctx).nextUse, back := if ((blockOperand'.get! ctx).value.get! ctx).firstUse = some blockOperand then BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockOperandNextUse blockOperand' else if blockOperand' = blockOperand then BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockFirstUse (blockOperand'.get! ctx).value else (blockOperand.get! ctx).back, owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value }
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_BlockOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hblockOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumRegions! (BlockOperandPtr.insertIntoCurrent ctx blockOperand' hblockOperand' ctxInBounds) = operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getRegion!_BlockOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hblockOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {i : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.get!_BlockOperandPtr_insertIntoCurrent {blockOperand' : BlockOperandPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {hblockOperand' : blockOperand'.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {blockOperandPtr : BlockOperandPtrPtr} :
    blockOperandPtr.get! (BlockOperandPtr.insertIntoCurrent ctx blockOperand' hblockOperand' ctxInBounds) = if blockOperandPtr = blockOperandNextUse blockOperand' then ((blockOperand'.get! ctx).value.get! ctx).firstUse else if blockOperandPtr = blockFirstUse (blockOperand'.get! ctx).value then some blockOperand' else blockOperandPtr.get! ctx
    source

    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.get!_OperationPtr_linkBetween {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    block.get! (op'.linkBetween ctx prev next selfIn prevIn nextIn) = block.get! ctx

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_OperationPtr_linkBetween {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (op'.linkBetween ctx prev next selfIn prevIn nextIn)).prev = if some operation = next then some op' else if operation = op' then prev else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_OperationPtr_linkBetween {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (op'.linkBetween ctx prev next selfIn prevIn nextIn)).next = if some operation = prev then some op' else if operation = op' then next else (operation.get! ctx).next

    operation.getRegion! (op'.linkBetween ctx prev next selfIn prevIn nextIn) i = operation.getRegion! ctx i

    op'.setParentWithCheck ctx newParent selfIn = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).parent = if operation = op' then some newParent else (operation.get! ctx).parent

    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_OperationPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {parent : BlockPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    op'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).firstOp = if parent = block ∧ prev = none then some op' else (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_OperationPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {parent : BlockPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    op'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).lastOp = if parent = block ∧ next = none then some op' else (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_OperationPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {parent : BlockPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    op'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).prev = if some operation = next then some op' else if operation = op' then prev else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_OperationPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {parent : BlockPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    op'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).next = if some operation = prev then some op' else if operation = op' then next else (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_OperationPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {op' : OperationPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option OperationPtr} {parent : BlockPtr} {selfIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : OperationPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : OperationPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    op'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).parent = if operation = op' then some parent else (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source

    (block.get! (block'.linkBetween ctx prev next selfIn prevIn nextIn)).prev = if some block = next then some block' else if block = block' then prev else (block.get! ctx).prev

    block'.setParentWithCheck ctx newParent selfIn = some newCtx → (block'.get! ctx).parent = none

    block'.setParentWithCheck ctx newParent selfIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).parent = if block = block' then some newParent else (block.get! ctx).parent

    block'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block'.get! ctx).parent = none

    block'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse

    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_BlockPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {block' : BlockPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option BlockPtr} {parent : RegionPtr} {selfIn : block'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : BlockPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : BlockPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    block'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).prev = if some block = next then some block' else if block = block' then prev else (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_BlockPtr_linkBetweenWithParent {block' : BlockPtr} {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {prev next : Option BlockPtr} {parent : RegionPtr} {selfIn : block'.InBounds ctx} {prevIn : ∀ (prev_1 : BlockPtr), prev = some prev_1 → prev_1.InBounds ctx} {nextIn : ∀ (next_1 : BlockPtr), next = some next_1 → next_1.InBounds ctx} {parentIn : parent.InBounds ctx} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    block'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).next = if some block = prev then some block' else if block = block' then next else (block.get! ctx).next

    block'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).parent = if block = block' then some parent else (block.get! ctx).parent

    block'.linkBetweenWithParent ctx prev next parent selfIn prevIn nextIn parentIn = some newCtx → (region.get! newCtx).firstBlock = if prev = none ∧ region = parent then some block' else (region.get! ctx).firstBlock
